violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (bottom of slicer and blade sharpener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took slicer apart to be sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
Several sinks were observed with a continuous leak. Sinks to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have a small accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Cheese and bacon were observed not marked with the date of preparation in the walk-in cooler. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm and other debris. Ice machine must be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
